scripts.deploy: bun run build && bun x hardhat ignition deploy ignition/modules/Registry.ts --network localhost --reset && bun run generate-abi
scripts.deploy:sepolia: bun run build && bun x hardhat ignition deploy ignition/modules/Registry.sepolia.ts --network sepolia --parameters ignition/parameters/sepolia.json && bun run generate-abi
scripts.deploy:base-sepolia: bun run build && bun x hardhat ignition deploy ignition/modules/Registry.base-sepolia.ts --network base-sepolia --parameters ignition/parameters/base-sepolia.json && bun run generate-abi
scripts.deploy:base: bun run build && bun x hardhat ignition deploy ignition/modules/Registry.production.ts --network base --parameters ignition/parameters/base.json && bun run generate-abi
scripts.deploy:mainnet: bun run build && bun x hardhat ignition deploy ignition/modules/Registry.production.ts --network mainnet --parameters ignition/parameters/mainnet.json && bun run generate-abi
scripts.verify:sepolia: bun x hardhat ignition verify chain-11155111 --network sepolia
scripts.verify:base-sepolia: bun x hardhat ignition verify chain-84532 --network base-sepolia
scripts.verify:base: bun x hardhat ignition verify chain-8453 --network base
scripts.verify:mainnet: bun x hardhat ignition verify chain-1 --network mainnet
